# Semantic Kernel to Agent Framework Progress

## Overview

Validate whether SK Agents to Agent Framework migration applies to this solution, then complete migration work only when applicable. This run includes a custom Semantic Kernel core refactor and continued modernization toward Microsoft.Extensions.AI style.
